sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GUILLAUME [V] de Montpellier ([1073/74]-before 21 Feb 1122).
Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - GUILLAUME [V] de Montpellier, son of BERNARD GUILLAUME [IV] Seigneur de Montpellier & his wife Ermengarde --- (-before 21 Feb 1122).

zh.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER是Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV和Senegundis的兒子，於1073年2月出生在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也。他於1086年7月與Ermessinde de MELGUEIL在法國奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1122年2月21日在塞浦路斯享年49歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER是Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV和Senegundis的儿子，于1073年2月出生在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也。他于1086年7月与Ermessinde de MELGUEIL在法国奧其坦尼賀勞爾特蒙培利也结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1122年2月21日在塞浦路斯享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER was born in February 1073, in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France as the son of Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV and Senegundis. He married Ermessinde de MELGUEIL in July 1086, in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 21 February 1122, in Cyprus, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER est né en février 1073, à Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France, fils de Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV et Senegundis. Il a épousé Ermessinde de MELGUEIL en juillet 1086, à Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 21 février 1122, à Chypre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER wurde im Februar 1073 in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich, als Sohn von Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV und Senegundis geboren. Er hat im Juli 1086 in Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Frankreich Ermessinde de MELGUEIL geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 21. Februar 1122 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Zypern.

it.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER è nato il nel febbraio 1073 nel Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia come figlio di Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV e Senegundis. Lui sposato Ermessinde de MELGUEIL nel luglio 1086, nel Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 febbraio 1122, nel Cipro, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIERは1073年2月にフランスオクシタニーheラウルトモントペリールでBernard Guillaume de Montpellier IVとSenegundisの息子として生まれた。1086年7月にフランスオクシタニーheラウルトモントペリールでErmessinde de MELGUEILと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1122年2月21日にキプロスで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER(은)는 1073년 2월 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV(와)과 Senegundis의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1086년 7월 프랑스 옥시탠이 he라트 몽펠리어에서 Ermessinde de MELGUEIL(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1122년 2월 21일 키프로스에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.FEB 1073–21 FEB 1122: 1073 оны Хоёрдугаар сар–1122 оны Хоёрдугаар сарын 21

pt.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER nasceu em fevereiro de 1073, em Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, França filho de Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV e Senegundis. Ele casou-se com Ermessinde de MELGUEIL em julho de 1086, em Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1122, em Chipre, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER родился февраль 1073 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, окситани, Франция. Его родителей звали Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV и Senegundis. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermessinde de MELGUEIL июль 1086 г. в местности монтпеллиир, хeраулт, окситани, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 21 февраля 1122 г. в местности Кипр в возрасте 49 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Guillaume V de MONTPELLIER nació en febrero de 1073, en Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia como hijo de Bernard Guillaume de Montpellier IV y Senegundis. Se casó con Ermessinde de MELGUEIL en julio de 1086, en Montpellier, Hérault, Occitanie, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de febrero de 1122, en Chipre, a la edad de 49 años.
